items.title: LAF claims soldier and officer injured in Israeli strike
items.desc: The Lebanese Armed Forces announced that an officer and a soldier were lightly injured due to an Israeli strike on Kafr Kafra in the Bint Jbeil area.According to the announcement, the two were injured while travelling in a military vehicle in the area.
